outreachAngle.hook: Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your restaurant in Brisbane City, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like.
outreachAngle.observation: 很适合做官网/SEO/本地获客切入
outreachAngle.diagnosis: AJ Vietnamese Noodle House appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible restaurant site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion.
